guidanceConsulted.query: stream LLM tokens to the DOM without INP regressions
guidanceConsulted.recommendation: Keep heavy work off the main thread and yield so token streaming does not spike INP.
guidanceConsulted.appliedOrException: applied — text-generation runs in a dedicated module Web Worker (models/mobilellm-r1/worker.js); the page only appends streamed tokens. The single 128k-vocab softmax for the see-inside top-k also runs in the worker, never on the main thread.
guidanceConsulted.evidence: worker.js pipeline() + TextStreamer; main page receives postMessage tokens; conformance real-inference/no-fake pass

guidanceConsulted.query: run inference in a web worker off the main thread
guidanceConsulted.recommendation: Defer background work so critical input stays responsive.
guidanceConsulted.appliedOrException: applied — generation is fully off-thread; the composer/textarea and Stop button stay interactive during streaming (InterruptableStoppingCriteria).
guidanceConsulted.evidence: worker.js message handler; Stop wired to stopper.interrupt()

guidanceConsulted.recommendation: Use cross-document view transitions for catalogue↔page navigation.
guidanceConsulted.appliedOrException: applied — @view-transition navigation:auto in public/styles.css (invariant 6); page links to catalogue via crumbs.

guidanceConsulted.query: responsive control panel without horizontal overflow
guidanceConsulted.recommendation: Fluid layout; avoid fixed widths; wrap controls.
guidanceConsulted.appliedOrException: applied — flex-wrap controls, min-inline-size:0 textareas, table-layout:fixed glance table with overflow-wrap:anywhere. responsive-check: desktop clean, mobile clean (0px overflow).

openQuestions: Does MobileLLM-R1-360M produce coherent step-by-step reasoning at q4 on the WASM path? (agent-verified: yes — <think> traces on math, real def is_prime() on code, correct \boxed{Paris}; ~5 tok/s on CPU.)
Is the <image> tokenizer artifact and <think> split handled honestly for display? (yes — stripArtifacts removes only the Llama-4 <image> placeholder; renderReasoning styles the real trace.)
Does mobilellm-r1 produce semantically correct text-generation output on a real device (manual-evidenced)?
Are all controls keyboard-operable with visible focus on both classes?

followUpGoals.goal: Agent matrix pass for mobilellm-r1: Read the mobile+desktop screenshots, confirm real output + tap targets + focus + dialogs, then flip support to ok (or unsupported+evidence) and enrich this critique.

summary: Revision-1 seed for mobilellm-r1 (text-generation, wasm) derived from the real conformance run + responsive screenshots. Auto-checkable assertions are recorded with their true pass/fail/blocked state; manual-evidenced dimensions await an agent verdict. Not a final review.
